nodes.label: AI for non-publishable personal work
nodes.grounding_span: I only use the AI when it's not going to be publishable work

nodes.label: AI reliability in familiar domain
nodes.grounding_span: For personal work, I know very easily if there has been a mistake through the AI process

nodes.label: AI as substitute for experience
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not convinced that AI can be a substitute for experience

nodes.label: AI trained on published data vs. unpublished tacit knowledge
nodes.label_negative: AI trained on comprehensive data including unpublished knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: So much of science is unpublished... so I would not rely on an AI model which has been trained with published data alone

nodes.label: AI for data extraction from graphs and tables
nodes.label_negative: Manual data extraction from graphs and tables
nodes.grounding_span: Compiling data sets from multiple papers into complex tables... if I could drop a graph PNG into a model and the AI returned a table of the data my life would be so much easier

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: my life would be so much easier

nodes.label: Epistemic trust and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I may not notice any errors, so I would have to fact check anyway

nodes.label: Expertise and experiential knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I have years of experience behind me looking at strange data sets

nodes.label: Cautious selective use of AI for personal notes
nodes.grounding_span: I've used AI to summarize notes I've made during the literature review phase

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI for unfamiliar or complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not convinced that AI can be a substitute for experience

nodes.label: Aspirational desire for AI in data extraction
nodes.grounding_span: if I could drop a graph PNG into a model and the AI returned a table of the data my life would be so much easier

nodes.label: Domain-expertise-based verification — relies on own knowledge to check AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: For personal work, I know very easily if there has been a mistake through the AI process

nodes.label: Experience-driven pattern recognition — uses tacit knowledge from past experiments
nodes.grounding_span: I have years of experience behind me looking at strange data sets, so I can make inferences on data quality
